rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or removing invalid clauses, not by adding architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
Comparison expressions are bool; integer literals and integer arithmetic are int; real literals and real arithmetic are real
generic_rules: Fix the root unresolved reference, or delete the invalid clause instead of adding architecture
Align the helper declaration type with the expression
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
Comparison expressions are bool; integer literals and integer arithmetic are int; real literals and real arithmetic are real
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix validator diagnostics
Do not use package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
